rulings.Case Title: ZAKARIAH MADRIGAL et al VS. J. VALLES TRUCKING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Determine Good Faith Of Settlement Pursuant To Ccp 877.6;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 19, 2010, line 1, DEFENDANTS PHILLIP SANCHEZ, J. VALLES TRUCKING, INC. Motion to Determine Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To CCP 877.6. Motion granted, settlement is in the ballpark. Court grants joinder. There is no dispute that Harris Salinas Rebar Inc. is an additional insured under movant's policy and therefore settlement is in good faith as to both settling defendants. This order does not affect claims for express indemnity. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ZAKARIAH MADRIGAL et al VS. J. VALLES TRUCKING et al

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 19, 2010, line 1, DEFENDANTS HARRIS SALINAS REBAR, INC. Notice and Joinder Of Harris Salinas Rebar, Inc. in Motion for Determination of Good Faith Settlement. Is granted. See tentative ruling as to Sanchez and Trucking. =(302/CWW)
